error: Model output did not contain a balanced JSON object.

action.note: Response envelope missing code, message, request_id, and data fields

findings.issue: Response does not use standard envelope with code, message, request_id, and data; instead uses status and payload
findings.evidence: Response JSON in case.md uses {"status":"ok","payload":{...}} instead of {"code":...,"message":...,"request_id":...,"data":...}

action.summary: Holdout case found one R005 violation. All other rules satisfied.
